languages.original_text: "In the name of all that is sacred... is that the palace of Dargonus down there? It can't be! Lord Captain, on my life, I assure you, it cannot be the original! We have received no word from the capital that your ancestral residence has been... misplaced!"

languages.text: "Во имя всего святого... это что, дворец Даргонуса там, внизу? Не может быть! Лорд-капитан, я клянусь, уверяю вас, это не может быть оригинал! Из столицы не приходило никаких вестей о том, что ваша родовая резиденция... утеряна!"
languages.translation_comment: characters came to Trazyn's museum for the first time

languages.text: "In the name of all that is sacred... is that the palace of Dargonus down there? It can't be! Lord Captain, on my life, I assure you, it cannot be the original! We have received no word from the capital that your ancestral residence has been... misplaced!"
languages.original_text: "Во имя всего святого... это что, дворец Даргонуса там, внизу? Не может быть! Лорд-капитан, я клянусь, уверяю вас, это не может быть оригинал! Из столицы не приходило никаких вестей о том, что ваша родовая резиденция... утеряна!"

traits.locale_text: "In the name of all that is sacred... is that the palace of Dargonus down there? It can't be! Lord Captain, on my life, I assure you, it cannot be the original! We have received no word from the capital that your ancestral residence has been... misplaced!"

"In the name of all that is sacred... is that the palace of Dargonus down there? It can't be! Lord Captain, on my life, I assure you, it cannot be the original! We have received no word from the capital that your ancestral residence has been... misplaced!"

"In the name of all that is sacred... is that the palace of Dargonus down there? It can't be! Lord Captain, on my life, I assure you, it cannot be the original! We have received no word from the capital that your ancestral residence has been... misplaced!"

languages.text: 「神聖なるものすべての名において…あの下はドラゴナス王宮ですか？ありえない！艦長殿、私の命を賭けてお伝えしますが、それはオリジナルではないでしょう！首都から、貴殿の祖先が住んでいた家が…置き換えられたという知らせは受け取っていません！」
languages.original_text: "In the name of all that is sacred... is that the palace of Dargonus down there? It can't be! Lord Captain, on my life, I assure you, it cannot be the original! We have received no word from the capital that your ancestral residence has been... misplaced!"

traits.locale_text: 「神聖なるものすべての名において…あの下はドラゴナス王宮ですか？ありえない！艦長殿、私の命を賭けてお伝えしますが、それはオリジナルではないでしょう！首都から、貴殿の祖先が住んでいた家が…置き換えられたという知らせは受け取っていません！」

languages.text: « Par tout ce qui est sacré... est-ce le palais de Dargonus, en bas ? C'est impossible ! {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, sur ma vie, je vous assure que ça ne peut pas être l'original ! La capitale nous aurait forcément contactés si votre résidence ancestrale avait soudain disparu ! »
languages.original_text: "In the name of all that is sacred... is that the palace of Dargonus down there? It can't be! Lord Captain, on my life, I assure you, it cannot be the original! We have received no word from the capital that your ancestral residence has been... misplaced!"

traits.locale_text: « Par tout ce qui est sacré... est-ce le palais de Dargonus, en bas ? C'est impossible ! {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, sur ma vie, je vous assure que ça ne peut pas être l'original ! La capitale nous aurait forcément contactés si votre résidence ancestrale avait soudain disparu ! »

languages.text: "Bei allem, was heilig ist ... ist das da unten der Palast von Dargonus? Das ist unmöglich! Lord Captain, ich versichere Euch bei meinem Leben, das kann nicht das Original sein! Die Hauptstadt hat uns nicht informiert, dass Eure angestammte Residenz ... verlegt wurde!"
languages.original_text: "In the name of all that is sacred... is that the palace of Dargonus down there? It can't be! Lord Captain, on my life, I assure you, it cannot be the original! We have received no word from the capital that your ancestral residence has been... misplaced!"

traits.locale_text: "Bei allem, was heilig ist ... ist das da unten der Palast von Dargonus? Das ist unmöglich! Lord Captain, ich versichere Euch bei meinem Leben, das kann nicht das Original sein! Die Hauptstadt hat uns nicht informiert, dass Eure angestammte Residenz ... verlegt wurde!"

languages.text: "Kutsal olan her şey adına... Aşağıda Dargonus sarayı mı var? Olamaz! Lord Kaptan, hayatım üzerine yemin ederim ki bu orijinali olamaz! Başkentten atalarınızın ikametgâhının... Yerinin değiştiğine dair hiçbir haber almadık!"
languages.original_text: "In the name of all that is sacred... is that the palace of Dargonus down there? It can't be! Lord Captain, on my life, I assure you, it cannot be the original! We have received no word from the capital that your ancestral residence has been... misplaced!"

traits.locale_text: "Kutsal olan her şey adına... Aşağıda Dargonus sarayı mı var? Olamaz! Lord Kaptan, hayatım üzerine yemin ederim ki bu orijinali olamaz! Başkentten atalarınızın ikametgâhının... Yerinin değiştiğine dair hiçbir haber almadık!"

languages.text: «En nombre de todo lo que es sagrado... ¿eso de ahí abajo es el palacio de Dargonus? ¡No puede ser! ¡Lord Capitán, le juro por mi vida que no puede ser el original! ¡No nos han notificado desde la capital que se haya... extraviado su ancestral residencia!».
languages.original_text: "In the name of all that is sacred... is that the palace of Dargonus down there? It can't be! Lord Captain, on my life, I assure you, it cannot be the original! We have received no word from the capital that your ancestral residence has been... misplaced!"

traits.locale_text: «En nombre de todo lo que es sagrado... ¿eso de ahí abajo es el palacio de Dargonus? ¡No puede ser! ¡Lord Capitán, le juro por mi vida que no puede ser el original! ¡No nos han notificado desde la capital que se haya... extraviado su ancestral residencia!».

languages.text: “以诸圣之名……底下那难道是达戈努斯的宫殿？这不可能！舰长大人，我以性命担保，那绝不可能是原物！首都方面从未传来消息说您的祖宅已经……移位至此！”
languages.original_text: "In the name of all that is sacred... is that the palace of Dargonus down there? It can't be! Lord Captain, on my life, I assure you, it cannot be the original! We have received no word from the capital that your ancestral residence has been... misplaced!"

traits.locale_text: “以诸圣之名……底下那难道是达戈努斯的宫殿？这不可能！舰长大人，我以性命担保，那绝不可能是原物！首都方面从未传来消息说您的祖宅已经……移位至此！”
